case_title: REID, GAIL A. vs. SAN FRANCISCO AFRICAN-AMERICAN HISTORICAL &

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, GAIL A. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AFRICAN-AMERICAN HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL SOCIETY, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AFRICAN-AMERICAN HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL SOCIETY, INC. $13,477.21 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,560.21
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AFRICAN-AMERICAN HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL SOCIETY, INC.
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, GAIL A. HEARING SET FOR JUL-26-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HADIARIS, PETER NICHOLAS SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR REID, GAIL A.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY SF SHERIFF DEPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, GAIL A. SERVED JUL-12-1996, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AFRICAN-AMERICAN HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL SOCIETY, INC.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF JUL-26-1996 DENIED EXCEPT AS TO $1,800.00 WHICH SHOULD BE RETURNED TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR FORTHWITH.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,403.24 AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AFRICAN-AMERICAN HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL SOCIETY, INC.
